title: vachellia nilotica subsp. nilotica
intro: Vachellia nilotica subsp. nilotica, also known as the nilotic acacia or black thorn, is a species of tree in the subfamily Mimosoideae, native to the dry regions of East Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Vachellia nilotica subsp. nilotica include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating wounds, as well as providing relief from gastrointestinal disorders. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and powdered forms, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
